message:
Split body.zig, expressions.zig; add assertRaises to unittest

body.zig (517→231): Extract class_fields.zig (155), class_methods.zig (160)
expressions.zig (500→144): Extract arithmetic.zig (237), logical.zig (145)
unittest: Add assertRaises for error-returning callable checks

files.patch:
@@ -64,4 +64,11 @@ def setUp(self):
     def test_setup_ran(self):
         self.assertEqual(self.value, 42)
 
+# Note: assertRaises test requires a callable that returns an error
